summary: Iteration 35 - Agent Generator (AgentBuilder) Feature Testing Complete. All requested features verified working: (1) 5-step guided questionnaire (Segment > Objective > Tone > Business Info > Generate), (2) 16 segment buttons with golden highlight on selection, (3) 5 objectives with icons and descriptions, (4) 5 tones with example phrases, (5) Business form with required/optional fields and validation, (6) AI generation (POST /api/agents/generate-preview) returns complete agent config in ~35-55 seconds, (7) Deploy (POST /api/agents/deploy-generated) creates agent and redirects to /agents/{id}/config.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - appears on dashboard load but doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - proper use of environment variables, data-testids on all interactive elements
Backend agent_generator.py handles JSON parsing edge cases (markdown code blocks)
Frontend AgentBuilder.jsx properly validates form before enabling buttons
AI generation timeout is long (~35-55s) but expected due to Claude API complexity

success_rate.backend: 100% - All endpoints working (health, auth validation, generate-preview, deploy-generated)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements verified, navigation works, AI generation complete, deploy successful

seed_data_creation: Created test agents: TEST_QuickValidation, TEST_DeployAgent, TEST_UI_TestBusiness, TEST_DeployTestClinic (via AI generation and deploy)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 35: Agent Generator (AgentBuilder) feature fully tested. All 5 steps work: Segment (16 options), Objective (5 options), Tone (5 options with examples), Business Info (form validation), Generate (AI returns in ~35-55s). Deploy creates agent in database and redirects to /agents/{id}/config. Backend uses Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent LLM key. Key data-testids: seg-{id}, obj-{id}, tone-{id}, biz-name, biz-desc, builder-next-btn, builder-prev-btn, builder-generate-btn, builder-deploy-btn, builder-regenerate-btn, toggle-prompt.
